hero.subheadline: I'm Sabbir Hossain — a web developer with 7+ years crafting conversion-focused digital experiences. I've helped 100+ businesses grow through stunning, strategic websites.

about.name: Sabbir Hossain
about.description: Hi, I'm Sabbir — a web developer specializing in building high-converting, business-focused websites. Over the past 7+ years, I've helped 100+ businesses across various industries transform their online presence into powerful revenue-generating machines.
about.subDescription: I don't just build pretty websites — I build strategic digital assets engineered to convert visitors into paying customers, leveraging data-driven UX, performance optimization, and proven conversion psychology.
achievements: Average 3x ROI for clients within 6 months
Expert in WordPress, WooCommerce & Custom Builds

services.title: WordPress Development
services.description: Custom WordPress websites built for speed, security, and conversions. From blogs to complex business platforms.

services.title: Business Websites
services.description: Authority-building business websites designed to attract, engage, and convert your ideal customers.

services.title: Landing Page Design
services.description: High-converting landing pages engineered with proven CRO psychology to maximize campaign ROI.

services.title: Website Redesign
services.description: Transform your outdated website into a modern, conversion-focused powerhouse without losing SEO equity.

services.title: E-Commerce Development
services.description: Full-featured WooCommerce stores with optimized checkout flows, inventory management, and payment integration.

services.title: Speed Optimization
services.description: Achieve 95+ PageSpeed scores. Faster websites rank higher, convert better, and retain visitors longer.

services.title: SEO-Friendly Development
services.description: Every site built with technical SEO foundations — structured data, Core Web Vitals, semantic HTML.

services.title: UI/UX Design
services.description: Research-driven UI/UX design that guides users to conversion through intuitive flows and strategic layouts.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: Deep-dive into your business goals, target audience, competitors, and conversion objectives.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: Wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity UI design with a focus on conversion architecture.

steps.title: Development
steps.description: Pixel-perfect development with clean code, fast load times, and mobile-first excellence.

steps.title: Launch
steps.description: Rigorous QA testing, SEO setup, performance optimization, and smooth go-live handoff.

steps.title: Optimization
steps.description: Post-launch analysis, A/B testing, conversion rate optimization, and continuous improvements.

projects.title: HELMONT
projects.description: Premium corporate website for a Sydney-based builder and developer.
projects.longDescription: HELMONT is a Sydney-based builder–developer delivering disciplined residential projects. We built a clean, restrained, and highly professional corporate website that matched their ethos of 'quality enforced on site, not promised in marketing.'
projects.problem: HELMONT needed a digital presence that reflected their restrained, high-quality approach to residential development without looking like a generic real estate template.
projects.solution: Designed a minimalist, typography-driven website that puts the focus entirely on their projects and core principles. Simplified the navigation and ensured seamless mobile responsiveness.

projects.title: Success International Trading
projects.description: Global B2B catalog site for a Malaysia-based import-export company.
projects.longDescription: Success International Trading supplies high-quality food commodities, garments, and motor parts to international markets. They required a robust B2B platform to showcase their global supply chain capabilities and connect with international partners.
projects.problem: The company lacked a centralized digital catalog to showcase their diverse product lines (food commodities, garments, and motor parts) to international buyers.
projects.solution: Developed a structured B2B website with clear product categorization, easy-to-use inquiry forms, and a professional aesthetic to build trust with global partners.
results: Professional digital representation of their supply chain

projects.title: Sivo Consulting
projects.description: A modern, conversion-focused website for a strategic business consultancy.
projects.longDescription: Sivo Consulting helps businesses move forward with purpose through clear strategies and digital marketing. We designed a professional platform to highlight their services, from financial strategy to brand development, driving consultation bookings.
projects.problem: Sivo Consulting needed a digital hub that clearly communicated their wide range of services—from operational efficiency to digital marketing—while driving potential clients to book consultations.
projects.solution: Built a clean, authoritative website with clear service breakdowns, integrated testimonial sections, and prominent call-to-actions to schedule consultations.
results: Clear, structured presentation of consulting services

projects.title: Boca Raton Pergola Builder
projects.description: Lead generation site for Boca Raton's premier custom aluminum pergola and patio cover builders.
projects.longDescription: A robust local services website designed for Boca Raton's premier indoor-outdoor living construction company. The site highlights full-service pergola builds, motorized louvered roofs, and patio covers, focusing heavily on lead generation and highlighting their HOA compliance expertise.
projects.problem: The client needed a digital presence to dominate the South Florida market, stand out among other contractors, and streamline leads for high-end motorized and aluminum pergolas.
projects.solution: Built an optimized, mobile-responsive local business website using WordPress and Elementor. Highlighted their stress-free HOA permitting service, comprehensive service areas, and featured localized SEO landing pages to increase their visibility in Palm Beach County.
results: Streamlined lead capture for high-ticket builds
Clear communication of HOA and permitting capabilities

projects.title: Nexstart
projects.description: Strategic consulting & sales growth solutions for modern businesses looking to scale fast.
projects.longDescription: Nexstart supports businesses with clear strategy, practical guidance, and measurable results. By combining consulting expertise, high-performing sales development, and global trade operations, we help leaders simplify complex challenges and enter new international markets with confidence.
projects.problem: Ambitious companies often struggle to scale revenue effectively, build high-performing sales teams, and navigate the complex logistics of international expansion.
projects.solution: Designed and deployed a comprehensive digital presence that clearly outlines Nexstart's core offerings—providing a professional, lead-generating hub for their consulting, training, and global logistics services.
results: Established a highly professional digital presence
Clear communication of diverse corporate services

testimonials.name: pierree***
testimonials.content: Working with MD Alauddin was an outstanding experience. He exceeded all my expectations — not only did he deliver a premium-quality website ahead of schedule, but he was also extremely responsive, detail-oriented, and proactive throughout the entire process.

testimonials.name: lolita***
testimonials.content: I am a repeat customer. It is always a pleasure to work with this seller, as he is diligent and very knowledgeable about website development. He works hard to ensure customer satisfaction. I definitely recommend him for website services.

testimonials.name: reality***
testimonials.content: Md was great, as always. I’ve worked with him on several of my websites and have consistently been happy with the results. Will definitely hire again.

testimonials.name: dobai***
testimonials.content: This was our 4th project it’s always good to work with him I’m fully satisfied with his service highly recommend! 😎

testimonials.name: genesis***
testimonials.content: Work was done to expectations with timely response on requested updates/revisions. Would definitely recommend his website development services and utilize him for future planned phases.

testimonials.name: oscarde***
testimonials.content: MD is the Man he went above and beyond highly recommended

testimonials.name: cesarre***
testimonials.content: Amazing work as always. Glad to work with seller
